title: rhododendron dauricum subsp. ledebourii
intro: Rhododendron dauricum subsp. ledebourii, also known as Korean rhododendron or Ledebour's rhododendron, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic acids content. The health benefits of Rhododendron dauricum subsp. ledebourii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve cardiovascular health. Rhododendron dauricum subsp. ledebourii is commonly used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often combined with other medicinal plants like ginseng and licorice root.
